{{Quote|Warrant Officer Urman Nakk, Security, are you widely considered to be an idiot? Because in less than a day, I can guarantee that you will be. By your fellow security officers. By your superiors. By your family and your pets. By the officers who court-martial you. And the taint will stay with you throughout your life, because I am a brilliant historian and commentator and you are, at best, a mediocre desk pilot.|Wolam Tser|<ref name="Enemy Lines 2: Rebel Stand">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''</ref>}}
'''Wolam Tser''' was a noted [[holodocumentarian]] and [[Historian/Legends|historian]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. His voice was easily recognized by those who lived in the years following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. After escaping [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] following the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion]], he brought crucial information on the occupation and [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] of the planet to New Republic leaders on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]]. He was later responsible for narrating the holo [[Battle of Borleias (holodocumentary)|''Battle of Borleias'']], filmed by his partner, [[Tam Elgrin]].

During the conflict between the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]] and [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s office in [[43 ABY]], Tser reported on the debacle from in front of the [[Galactic Courts of Justice/Legends|Galactic Courts of Justice Building]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Courscant]].<ref name="Outcast">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]''</ref>
